case_title: BENNIE W. LEWIS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS ASSIGNED BY DEPT. 206. APPEARANCES ON BOTH SIDES. ARGUMENTS IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT AND PARTIES MET IN CHAMBERS. THE PARTIES SETTLED THIS MATTER AND THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT WERE PUT ON THE RECORD. UPON RECEIPT OF THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT, THE PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO NOTICE SENT.
